Mathematics Practice,
Perfected

Exact symbolic math. No decimals. No approximations.
Just precision.

Download on the App Store

Features

Six Topics. Infinite Practice.

Every answer is exact symbolic math — never a decimal approximation.

Numerical Calculations

Lightning-fast mental arithmetic with instant feedback.

Trig Exact Values

Recall exact trigonometric values at all standard angles.

Differentiation

Differentiate polynomials, trig functions, and more.

Antidifferentiation

Find antiderivatives with exact symbolic results.

Complex Numbers

Convert between Cartesian and polar form instantly.

Log & Index Laws

Master logarithmic and index law manipulation.

Competition

Compete. Climb.
Conquer.

Elo-rated head-to-head competitions where every point matters.

Matched by skill

Elo-based matchmaking pairs you with players at your level.

Same question, same clock

Both players see identical questions simultaneously. Speed and accuracy win.

Real stakes

Win Elo points. Climb the leaderboard. Challenge your friends.

Streaks

Build Your Streak. Build Your Skills.

Complete daily question targets to grow your streak. Miss a day and it resets — unless you have a life.

0

day streak

Level 1

20 questions in any one topic per day.

Free + Premium

Level 2

20 questions in 3 different topics per day.

Premium

Level 3

20 questions in all 6 topics per day. The ultimate challenge.

Premium

Premium members get 2 lives/month to protect their streak.
